features.subtitle: As someone with ADHD and autism, I struggled a lot to be self-aware and disciplined. So I've created tools that make it unreasonable and impossible not to reach our goals👌

tabs.heading: ObsiFlowz
tabs.content: I'm currenly using Obsidian a a note app so I design amazing plugins to supercharge your Obsidian experience. Transform your content curation with RSSFlowz and optimize your plugin research management with PluginFlowz.
